title: Some more workers comp case studies...
description: James Harris had been employed by a maintenance company for many years when one afternoon at work his back gave out on him after moving a heavy hose. After 5 months of fighting, his employer finally agreed to pay for his back surgery which was very successful. With a few months of rehabilitation, James felt much better but was forced to find a new, less physically taxing job. This Worker’s Compensation case was fully settled in under 2 years for $92,000.

Assign to an SEO manager to analyze data from prior steps and write report with conclusions with actionable insights.

Skip to the SEO review section for exampl

title: GMB Audit -
assignees: Allen aka Little Murda, Clayton Coombs

title: Compare sitemap and page content to competition
description:
• Compare primary target pages to competition - are they thin?
  • Compare silos of content to competition. For example, does top ranking competitor have 20 subpages in a car accident silo? 
  • Leave remarks here.

title: Standard technical audit
description:
• Run a standard technical audit (currently what Mark gave Clayton and Allen)
  • Attach results here and in client folder
  • Copy observations from audit here
  • Don't try to fix anything, just make note if what you find. Tasks to fix things will be assigned after.

title: Pull internal links
description:
• Sitebulb, jetocopus or LinkResearchTools
  • Attach data here

title: Export sitemap as spreadsheet
description: Pull sitemap (usually at /sitemap.xml or /sitemap_index.xml) and save as spreadsheet in client folder.

title: Mobile & Performance Check
description:
• Run Lighthouse test and export results to PDF using this: https://googlechrome.github.io/lighthouse/viewer/ and attach results here
  • Run https://www.thinkwithgoogle.com/feature/testmysite and record r

title: Spot check panda or panda-like issues
description:
• Copy paste test case type pages
  • Check cannonicals (look at the crawl report from prior task)
  • Check GA for overall balance of traffic generating pages vs. dead pages last 6 months

title: Check if internal pages ranking for KW's
description: Check all primary KW's (case type lawyer city). Do correct pages rank for their kw's or does homepage or some other page rank instead or in addition to? Leave comments here.

title: Check site:[domain}
description:
• Do a site:[domain] search on Google 
  • Take screenshots of first 5 pages and attach

title: Check info:[domain]
description:
• Do an info:[domain] search in Google
  • Attach screenshot

title: Brand Spot Checks
description:
This is just a spot check. A more comprehensive set of work can be done with Mark's "HERO" process or comparable.

  • Search brand on Google
  • Does client's site rank? 
  • Is the result the homepage? 
  • Does homepage result have sitelinks? 
  • Does result show a KG? 
  • Does search show brand assets (Twitter, FB biz page, Yelp, ect.)?
